summary: Integration test passed: all schema objects verified (calls.analysis, calls.caller_mode, call_questions, prefab_answers tables). Synthetic investor call inserted and queried successfully with 4 questions across 4 categories. Pipeline verified: extractQuestions (fire-and-forget), getPrefabAnswers (FAQ injection), recordCallerMode (Vapi tool), sendRecapEmail (sentiment + grade + questions). Produced full operations runbook, post-mortem, and inventory doc.
learnings: Pulse tick blocking on /zo/ask spawns can timeout the parent thread — spawn in background with nohup for long-running drops
Manual drops need explicit meta.json status update after deposit — tick doesn't auto-detect deposits for awaiting_manual drops
Synthetic test data should be flagged for cleanup before production reporting
